name: Frontier Communications Parent, Inc.
description: Frontier Communications Parent, Inc. is a leading communications provider in the United States, offering high-speed broadband, digital television, voice, and advanced data services to residential and business customers. Operating a fiber-optic and copper network across multiple states, the company is focused on expanding its fiber-to-the-home footprint to deliver reliable, high-speed internet connectivity and meet the growing digital demands of its customers.
